    L

    Launcher - Class in it.polimi.Network.Client
    A simple launcher class to bypass the JavaFX module path check.
    Launcher() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Client.Launcher
     
    loadBuildings() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader
    Loads all building cards from buildings.json.
    loadCharacters() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader
    Loads all character cards from characters.json.
    loadEvents() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader
    Loads all event cards from events.json.
    loadOfferTiles() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader
    Loads all offer tiles from offer_tiles.json.
    loadTurnOrderTrackRules() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader
    Loads turn-order track food and prestige fallback rules from start.json.
    Lobby - Class in it.polimi.Network.Server
    A thread-safe registry that manages game rooms and active client connections.
    Lobby() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
    Constructs a new Lobby and starts the background connection monitoring task.
    Lobby(boolean) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
    Constructs a new Lobby with optional timeout monitor startup.
    login(RmiLoginRequest, ClientCallbackRemote) - Method in interface it.polimi.Network.RMI.GameServiceRemote
    Registers a player nickname and callback in the current match lobby.
    login(RmiLoginRequest, ClientCallbackRemote) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiGameService
    Handles RMI client login requests (creating, joining, or reconnecting to a game room).
